The Bid Security for the Bid is Rs.50,000/- in the form of Call Deposit/Bank Draft (refundable) drawn in favor of “COMSATS University Islamabad” (FTN/NTN: 9013701-9); scanned copy of which is required to be uploaded through EPADS and hard copy must be submitted physically along with hard-copy of sealed bidding document on the closing date of the tender to COMSATS University Islamabad on the address given below. 3. The complete Tendering process shall be carried out through EPADS. 4. Interested bidders are requested to register themselves on the EPADS https://eprocure.gov.pk and submit their tender documents on EPADS. 5. For registration and guidance/training on EPADS, you may contact EPADS UAN: 051-111-137-237. 6. Closing date of submission is July 16, 2026. by 1100 hours. The bids shall be opened half hour after the closing time in the presence of the bidders who wish to be present, in Room No. G-6/G-8, Ground Floor, Faculty Block-I, COMSATS University Islamabad. 7. As per PPRA Rule 33, CUI may reject all bids or proposals at any time prior to the acceptance of a bid or proposal. Contact Person and Submission In-Charge Procurement COMSATS University Islamabad 2nd Floor, Faculty Block-II, Park Road, Tarlai Kalan, Islamabad, Tel: 051-90495242, 051-9049-5154, 051-9049-5122 Email: mazhar_khan@comsats.edu.pk . Hiring of IT Firm for Development of Centralized Digital Data Management System for Pakistan Tobacco Board (PTB)
description: Pakistan Tobacco Board (PTB) currently relies on a manual and fragmented system for collection, compilation, and monitoring of crop, procurement, cess, and stakeholder data. Crop estimates, yield assessments, procurement data, and cess records are collected manually through field visits, physical forms, and spreadsheets, resulting in delays in reporting, data inconsistencies, limited traceability, and lack of real-time operational visibility PTB intends to hire a registered firm to develop a centralized digital platform comprising mobile applications (IOS & Android), web-based portals, centralized database, and executive dashboards for collection, reporting, monitoring, and analytics of tobacco sector data. At initial stage, the system shall focus on digital data collection, reporting, monitoring, and analytics. Detail information about organization is available on website: www.ptb.gov.pk. Bidding documents containing detail term and conditions, item-wise specification, procedure for submission of bids, bids security etc may be obtained from office of the Deputy Secretory Admn or download from PPRA website: www.ppra.org.pk or www.ptb.gov.pk. Accordingly firm will be selected through, “Single Stage Two Envelopes” procedure in accordance with the procedures set out in Rule- 36(b) of PPRA Rules, 2004 issued by the Public Procurement Regulatory Authority, as amended from time to time which can be viewed at the website: www.ppra.org.pk/legal documents/regulations. The parameters for evaluating bids are mentioned in bidding documents: Bidding documents must carefully be prepared in accordance with the instructions provided and shall be submitted through EPADS as per schedule mentioned on ePADs which shall be opened on the same day at 14:30 pm in the presence of and Bidders who may choose to be present. The Bid Security for the Bid is Rs. 70,000/- in the form of Call Deposit/Bank Draft (refundable) drawn in favor of “COMSATS University Islamabad” (FTN/NTN: 9013701-9); scanned copy of which is required to be uploaded through EPADS and hard copy must be submitted physically along with hard-copy of sealed bidding document on the closing date & time of the tender to COMSATS University Islamabad on the address given below. 3. The complete Tendering process shall be carried out through EPADS. 4. Interested bidders are requested to register themselves on the EPADS https://eprocure.gov.pk and submit their tender documents on EPADS. 5. For registration and guidance/training on EPADS, you may contact EPADS UAN: 051-111-137-237. 6. Closing date of submission is July 06, 2026. by 1100 hours. The Technical bids shall be opened half hour after the closing time in the presence of the bidders who wish to be present, in Room No. G-6/G-8, Ground Floor, Faculty Block-I, COMSATS University Islamabad. 7. As per PPRA Rule 33, CUI may reject all bids or proposals at any time prior to the acceptance of a bid or proposal. Contact Person and Submission In-Charge Procurement COMSATS University Islamabad 2nd Floor, Faculty Block-II, Park Road, Tarlai Kalan, Islamabad, Tel: 051-90495242, 051-9049-5154, 051-9049-5122 Email: mazhar_khan@comsats.edu.pk . COMSATS University Islamabad (CUI), a Public Sector University invites Bids through e-Pak Acquisition & Disposal System (EPADS) https://eprocure.gov.pk on “Single-Stage Single-Envelope” method from Income Tax & GST registered Firms/Companies who are on the Active Taxpayer List (ATL) for General Sales Tax and Income Tax of FBR. 2. The Bid Security for the Bid is Rs.50,000/- in the form of Call Deposit/Bank Draft (refundable) drawn in favor of “COMSATS University Islamabad” (FTN/NTN: 9013701-9); scanned copy of which is required to be uploaded through EPADS and hard copy must be submitted physically along with hard-copy of sealed bidding document on the closing date & time of the tender to COMSATS University Islamabad on the address given below. 3. The complete Tendering process shall be carried out through EPADS. 4. Interested bidders are requested to register themselves on the EPADS https://eprocure.gov.pk and submit their tender documents on EPADS. 5. For registration and guidance/training on EPADS, you may contact EPADS UAN: 051-111-137-237. 6. Closing date of submission is July 02, 2026. by 1100 hours. The bids shall be opened half hour after the closing time in the presence of the bidders who wish to be present, in Room No. G-6/G-8, Ground Floor, Faculty Block-I, COMSATS University Islamabad. 7. As per PPRA Rule 33, CUI may reject all bids or proposals at any time prior to the acceptance of a bid or proposal. Tender Notice for Selection of EPC Contractor for the Construction of Jinnah Medical Complex and Research Center, Islamabad, Pakistan
description: Dear Prospective Bidders, Jinnah Medical Construction Company (JMC) is a public-sector, not-for-profit organization established to strengthen Pakistan's healthcare system by delivering complex, high-quality healthcare infrastructure. Licensed under Section 42 of the Companies Act, 2017, JMC operates as a state-owned enterprise with a clear public-interest mandate. Jinnah Medical Complex and Research Center (JMCRC) is an envisioned state-of-the-art 1,400 Beds Teaching Hospital and Cutting Edge Research Center proposed to be situated in Islamabad. All prospective bidders (single entity or as a JV) registered with the Pakistan Engineering Council in Category CA for local bidders and Category FCA for Foreign Bidders are hereby invited to submit a Technical and a Financial Proposal for Engineering, Procurement and Construction (EPC) Works for the JINNAH MEDICAL COMPLEX AND RESEARCH CENTER (JMCRC) in the attached Bid Data Sheet (refer hereinafter as “BDS”) annexed with this Letter. This Proposal will form the basis for future negotiations and ultimately a Contract between your firm and The Employer named in the BDS. In the case of a joint venture, all JV members except the design partner must be registered in Category CA or FCA. The Design partner, in case of a local bidder, must be a registered consultant with the Pakistan Engineering Council, and in the case of a foreign bidder, must be registered with the local engineering council of their country of origin. The bidder must possess codes CE-01, CE-10, BC-03, ME-01, EE-04, and EE-05 for the Construction Partners and PEC Service Codes 0531 and 0532, along with Project Profile Codes 1201 and 1203 for the PEC Registered Consultant. In case there is no local consultant in the consortium, the design partner shall be required to be registered with the PEC under these codes prior to the award of works. The bidder must have collectively an average annual turnover for the last 5 years of PKR 56 Billion or 200 Million USD. The lead partner of the bidder must have completed construction of at least a 1,000-bed hospital (tertiary health care) as the Main/ Prime Contractor in the last 12 years; each construction partner must also have experience in completing at least 2 building projects in the last 7 years. In case the works have been carried out as a main contractor in conventional mode and not Page 1 of 3 VOLUME I – SECTION 1: INVITATION TO BID JINNAH MEDICAL COMPLEX AND RESEARCH CENTER (JMCRC) PROJECT EPC BIDDING DOCUMENT in EPC, the bidder shall demonstrate through experience of other JV members that they have also carried out the design of a hospital (tertiary health care) of 500 beds in the last 5 years. A brief description of the Works and its objectives is given in the Bidding Documents, with details being provided in the Employer’s Requirements. Works shall be implemented in accordance with the phasing indicated in the Bidding Documents. Jinnah Medical Construction Company (JMC) has been entrusted with the responsibility of implementing the Project as the Executing Agency by the Government of Pakistan. To obtain first-hand information on the Works and local conditions, you are encouraged to visit the site before submitting a Proposal and to attend a pre-bid meeting, if specified in the BDS. You must fully inform yourself of local conditions and take them into account in preparing your Proposal. The Employer shall provide the inputs specified in the BDS, assist the Bidders in obtaining the licenses and permits required to carry out the services, and make relevant project data and reports available. The cost of preparing the Proposal and of negotiating the Contract are not reimbursable as a direct cost of the Assignment; and The Employer is not bound to accept any of the Proposals submitted. Bidding shall be carried out under the Single Stage Two Envelope Procedure as defined under PPRA Rules 2004 (amended from time to time), rule 36(b), and shall take place through the EPADS system in line with E-Pak Procurement Regulations 2023. To prepare a Proposal, please use the Standard Bidding Forms listed in the BDS. Bidders requiring clarification of the Tender Documents must notify The Employer, in writing, not later than 7 (seven) days before the Proposal submission date—by email and through the EPADS portal. The Employer shall respond to such requests by email and through the EPADS portal, and copies of the response shall be sent to all prospective Bidders. At any time before the submission of Proposals, The Employer may, for any reason, whether at its own initiative or in response to a clarification requested by a prospective bidder, modify the Documents by an addendum, which shall be binding on all prospective bidders. The addendum shall be sent in writing via email and uploaded to the EPADS portal and shall be Page 2 of 3 VOLUME I – SECTION 1: INVITATION TO BID JINNAH MEDICAL COMPLEX AND RESEARCH CENTER (JMCRC) PROJECT EPC BIDDING DOCUMENT binding on all prospective bidders. The Employer may, at its discretion, extend the deadline for the submission of Proposals. All bids must be accompanied by a bid security in the form defined in the BDS to the tune of PKR 1,500,000,000/- (One Billion Five Hundred Million Only). The bid security in its original prescribed form must reach the office of the undersigned before the submission deadline, whereas the Technical and Financial proposals may be submitted online via EPADS. A pre-bid meeting shall be conducted on the date and venue mentioned in the Bidding Data Sheet. The deadline for submission of bids is June 18th, 2026, before 1600 HRS. The technical bids shall be opened in the presence of the bidders who wish to attend at 1630 HRS the same day. Dear Prospective Bidders, Jinnah Medical...
